topic: Stuck in a listening loop / same songs on repeat
unmet_need: Gentle nudges that expand the rotation without losing comfort
research_question: Q4 repeat-listening of the same content
top_keywords: app; love; songs; music; artists; recommendations
example_quote: The same 50 songs on repeat problem is so real. I love them but I'm in a loop and the app does nothing to gently expand it.

topic: No guided on-ramp into a new genre
unmet_need: Staged, goal-based exploration that coaches you into a genre
top_keywords: spotify; music; new; songs; playlists; new music
example_quote: As an aspirational explorer I save tons of new music and forget all of it. Retention and rotation are the real unmet need.

unmet_need: Genuinely novel recommendations that expand taste, not reinforce it
top_keywords: discovery; artists; new; like; echo chamber; echo
example_quote: I have ADHD and the firehose of new releases is completely overwhelming. Discovery is way too high-effort to keep up with.

topic: Discovery surfaces don't lead anywhere new
unmet_need: Discovery that introduces artists you'd never have found yourself
top_keywords: discover; weekly; discover weekly; week; playlist; artists
example_quote: I'd love a guided on-ramp to get into classical. Stage it for me week by week instead of one giant intimidating playlist.

topic: New music never sticks (discovery without adoption)
unmet_need: Reinforcement that converts a first play into a lasting habit
research_question: Q4 / core: adoption, not one-off plays
top_keywords: playlist; songs; play; song; playlists; add
example_quote: The killer feature would be adoption tracking. Most discovery never converts into a lasting habit a first play is not a win.
